children.heading: Grants and other foreign government assistance; family or household expense assistance prohibited; “Federal employee” defined
children.label: a Grants and other foreign government assistance; family or household expense assistance prohibited; “Federal employee” defined
A
children.text: which is of the type described in ,section 2452(a)(2)(i) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: which is conducted for a purpose comparable to the purpose stated in , andsection 2451 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: which is specifically approved by the Secretary of State for purposes of this section;

For purposes of this section, the term “Federal employee” means any employee as defined in subparagraphs (A) through (F) of , but does not include a person described in subparagraph (G) of such section.section 7342(a)(1) of title 5

children.heading: Foreign grants and other assistance not gifts for purposes ofsection 7342 of title 5
children.label: b Foreign grants and other assistance not gifts for purposes ofsection 7342 of title 5
children.text: The grants and other forms of assistance with respect to which the consent of Congress is given in subsection (a) of this section shall not constitute gifts for purposes of .section 7342 of title 5

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of State is authorized to promulgate regulations for purposes of this section.
